name: Lexware Office
description: Full Lexware Office integration: contacts (company/person), articles (products/services), quotations, invoices, voucher upload, and PDF download

credentials_required.label: Lexware API Token
credentials_required.hint: Create at app.lexware.de/addons/public-api — needs 'Public API' permission

tools.name: list_contacts
tools.description: List contacts with optional search by name, email, or role

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Get full details of a contact including address, email, phone

tools.name: create_company
tools.description: Create a company contact with address, email, phone

tools.name: create_person
tools.description: Create a person contact with address, email, phone

tools.name: update_contact_address
tools.description: Update the address of a contact

tools.name: update_contact_email
tools.description: Update the email of a contact

tools.name: update_contact_phone
tools.description: Update the phone number of a contact

tools.name: update_contact_name
tools.description: Update the name of a contact

tools.name: list_articles
tools.description: List articles (products and services) with optional type filter

tools.name: get_article
tools.description: Get details of a specific article

tools.name: create_article
tools.description: Create a new article (product or service) with price

tools.name: update_article
tools.description: Update an existing article

tools.name: delete_article
tools.description: Delete an article

tools.name: list_quotations
tools.description: List quotations with optional status filter

tools.name: get_quotation
tools.description: Get details of a quotation including line items

tools.name: create_quotation
tools.description: Create a quotation with line items for a contact

tools.name: list_invoices
tools.description: List invoices with optional status filter

tools.name: get_invoice
tools.description: Get details of an invoice including line items

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Create an invoice with line items for a contact

tools.name: create_invoice_from_quotation
tools.description: Create an invoice from an existing quotation

tools.name: upload_voucher
tools.description: Upload a voucher/receipt file via File Bridge

tools.name: download_invoice
tools.description: Download an invoice as PDF and send to user

tools.name: download_quotation
tools.description: Download a quotation as PDF and send to user

author: Bastian Hiller
